stanza: Stay a little longer, let the candle burn / I trace the quiet map of you and learn / Every breath you take is a place I want to go / Hold me like the secret only we two know
I kept your sweater and the smell of June / We danced barefoot to a borrowed tune / If devotion is a river, I am the shore / Wanting nothing in this world but a little more
Tender is the hour when your eyes find mine / Soft as the morning spilling over the pine / I am yours in every language I don't speak / Heart wide open, gentle, brave, and weak
Press your palm against my chest and feel / How a longing this long becomes so real / I'd cross a hundred winters just to stay / In the warmth of you at the end of the day
Write my name in the salt and the foam / Every wave is a road that leads me home / Passion like a lighthouse through the dark / You're the steady beat inside my beating heart
Intimacy is a whisper, not a shout / The tender little things we can't live without / Your hand in mine beneath the kitchen light / Falling, slow and certain, into the night
Pack the morning, leave the maps behind / The horizon's calling, bold and unconfined / We chase the thunder over canyon walls / Free as the wind where the eagle falls
Boots on the gravel, fire in the chest / We climb the mountain, never stop to rest / Triumph at the summit, scream into the blue / The whole wide world is waiting, brand new
Throw the windows open, let the engine roar / We were born for journeys, never for the shore / Epic in the headlights, fearless and alive / Every mile a story we survive
Up where the air is thin and the brave belong / We carry our courage like an old war song / Explore the unknown, plant a flag in the snow / Onward, ever onward, into the glow
Set the sails to the storm and don't look back / The ocean writes our names in a foaming track / Freedom is a country with no flag at all / We answer to the wild and the seabird's call
One more ridge, one more dawn to find / Leave the safe and easy lives behind / Bold as the lightning, fast as the deer / We laugh at the danger, we live without fear
I tripped on the cat and I blamed the rug / Spilled my coffee, gave the lamp a hug / Life's a banana peel, baby, slip and grin / Nobody's winning, so let's all dive in
Wore my shirt inside out to the fancy ball / Did a little wiggle, then I tripped down the hall / Everybody's laughing, hey at least it's free / The clown of the evening, that's gloriously me
Arms like spaghetti, knees like jelly beans / I dance like nobody knows what dancing means / Absurd and delighted, I wobble, I sway / Ridiculous and happy, that's the only way
Excuses on excuses, what a silly day / The hamster stole my homework and ran away / Wit and a wink and a banana phone / Laughing till the cows come marching home
How'd they get up there, nobody can say / Gravity called in sick again today / Playful little chaos, ironic and bright / We're throwing a comedy into the night
I packed a pickle for a serious meeting / Crunching loudly during the official greeting / Absurd is my middle name, comedy my song / Everything is funny when you do it all wrong
Steam off the coffee, dust in the sun / Nowhere to be and nothing to run / Soft like a blanket, easy and slow / Let the whole quiet morning gently flow
Sway with the palm trees, breathe with the breeze / Time melts like honey, calm as you please / Peaceful little heartbeat, nothing to prove / Just the lazy afternoon and the way we move
Toes in the water, mind drifting wide / Reflection of the willow on the gentle tide / Warmth on my shoulders, ease in my chest / The world can keep turning, I'm taking a rest
Quiet as a feather falling through the room / Soft golden hour, a slow exhale of bloom / Calm in the corners, peace in the air / Nothing to carry and nowhere to be there
Gray little raindrops drawing lines on the glass / A mug in my hands as the slow hours pass / Reflective and easy, gentle and true / Just me and the weather and a thought or two
Mist on the meadow, hush in the trees / Breathing in slow with the wandering breeze / Tranquil and tender, the day unwinds / Leaving all the worries and the clocks behind
Lights up, hands up, feel the bass collide / We're dancing till the morning, no place left to hide / Electric in the chorus, alive in the crowd / Turn it up, turn it up, scream it loud
Confetti in the air and the night is young / Every single body moving as one / High on the rhythm, hot on the floor / We came to the party and we want some more
Bass like a heartbeat shaking the room / Strobe in the darkness, electric perfume / Jump when it hits you, let the night ignite / We're the kings and queens of the neon light
Pop it and pour it, the city's awake / Dancing on tables for the fun of the shake / Excitement in stereo, hype in the veins / We chase the wild rhythm till nothing remains
Speakers are screaming and the floor is alive / Energy electric, we were born to thrive / Hands to the ceiling, lose it for the night / Nothing but the music and the flashing light
We burst like the fireworks over the town / Loud and unstoppable, never coming down / Celebrate the moment, every beat a flame / Dancing like the night will never know our name
